name: Alan Pasqua
abstract: Alan Pasqua (born June 28, 1952) is an American rock and jazz pianist. He studied at Indiana University and the New England Conservatory of Music.

concerts.label: New York Jazz Repertory Company: The Music of George Russell

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: Oh that was a song by the pianist Alan Pasqua and he calls that “Gumbo Time.” ... I like playing slower tempos more than faster tempos.
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Janis Siegel
about_quotes.evidence: I cite as some of the best examples Fred Hersch, John DiMartino, Alan Broadbent, Alan Pasqua, these are great accompanists.
about_quotes.doc_title: Janis Siegel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 22, 2015
